gaps.evidence: git log subjects with 'workaround'/'hotfix' in last 30.days.ago
commits mention 'sed' — likely manual AST patch
repeated reverts suggest landing quality gap

proposed_scanners.name: hx_bypass_lint_scan
proposed_scanners.rationale: detect commits that bypass existing lints (workaround/hotfix prefix)

proposed_scanners.name: hx_regression_velocity
proposed_scanners.rationale: track regression commit rate; alarm if > threshold

proposed_scanners.name: hx_sed_patch_audit
proposed_scanners.rationale: detect sed-driven edits that bypass Edit/Write tooling

proposed_scanners.name: hx_forced_rule_audit
proposed_scanners.rationale: enumerate every FORCED event → require resolution ticket

proposed_scanners.name: hx_revert_velocity
proposed_scanners.rationale: track revert frequency; flag weeks with >N reverts
